title: Conditional Type Filter

statement.markdown:
## Problem Statement
You are given a generic array and a conditional type function `filter<T, U>`. The `filter` function should return a new type that is T[] if all elements of the array are of type U. Otherwise, it should return never.

constraints: The `filter` function should be a generic function that takes an array type `T` and a predicate type `U` as arguments.
The `filter` function should return conditional type `T[U]` if all elements of the array are of type `U`. Otherwise, it should return `never`.
The solution should be written in TypeScript.
